_description: FLUX.2-dev prompts for wiki detail images. BG3-style stylized fantasy art, 512x512. Generated PNGs go to gs://atlas-bound-data/<category>/<slug>.png to match the getXxxImageUrl helpers in client/src/utils/compendiumIcons.ts.
_style_suffix: , Baldur's Gate 3 style stylized fantasy concept art, dark moody lighting, rich colors, rim light, painterly, cinematic, 4k, highly detailed
_negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, ugly, deformed, blurry, lowres, extra limbs

backgrounds.prompt: A young temple acolyte in flowing white and gold robes, holding a holy symbol pendant, serene expression, cathedral candlelight
A charismatic con artist in ornate noble clothing, smirking while shuffling forged documents, tavern setting with warm firelight
A hooded thief in dark leather armor, face partially in shadow, clutching a set of lockpicks, alley in moonlight
A traveling bard mid-performance, holding a lute, wearing bright colorful clothes and a feathered cap, tavern stage with lantern light
A common-born rural hero in practical leather armor holding a pitchfork, determined expression, farm fields at sunset
A master craftsman in leather apron with tools on belt, inspecting a finished piece, warmly lit workshop with tools
An elderly robed hermit with long white beard, holding a walking staff, standing in a misty forest clearing at dawn
A proud aristocrat in fine velvet clothes with a signet ring and sword at hip, standing in a castle hall, tapestries in background
A wilderness survivalist in fur and leather, carrying a spear and pack, windswept mountain vista
A wise scholar in robes surrounded by ancient tomes, holding a candle near an open book, library of wooden shelves
A weathered sailor with coiled rope, tricorn hat, tanned skin, ship's rigging behind them, stormy sea
A battle-hardened soldier in chain mail with a longsword, military insignia on tabard, war camp at dusk
A scrappy street kid in patched clothes with a small dagger, crouched on a city rooftop, foggy streets below

feats.prompt: A vigilant ranger in mid-turn with eyes wide, hand on weapon, sensing an unseen threat, misty forest
A powerful warrior mid-swing with a massive greataxe trailing motion blur, kicking up debris, battlefield
A master archer drawing a longbow with one eye closed, arrow nocked, golden hour light, distant castle wall
A disciplined soldier holding a long halberd in a ready stance, polearm gleaming, stone courtyard
A stalwart shield-bearer in heavy plate armor blocking a path, greatshield raised defensively, castle gate
A battle-mage weaving a glowing spell with one hand while holding a sword in the other, magic sparks and flames, battlefield
A smiling gambler rolling glowing dice on a wooden table, golden light emanating from the dice, tavern
A resilient fighter standing firm after taking a blow, chest armor scratched, defiant expression, blood on cheek
A determined warrior resisting a magical curse, glowing ward runes shielding them, dark wizard in background
A swift rogue mid-sprint across rooftops, wind in hair, motion blur, dusk city skyline
A battle-cleric tending to a wounded ally, glowing hands of healing light, bandages and herbs, war tent
A heroic commander in regal armor giving a rousing speech to troops, banner behind them, sunset battlefield
A graceful duelist parrying a blade with a rapier, intricate footwork, marble dueling court
A novice apprentice casting a first cantrip, small sparks of magic, old spellbook open, candlelit study

conditions.prompt: A figure with bandaged eyes, magical darkness swirling around their head, disoriented pose, dim torchlight
A glassy-eyed person with glowing pink heart magic around their head, entranced smile, ethereal
A warrior with hands over their ears, ringing visual waves expanding, anguished expression, chaotic battle
A terrified figure shrinking back with wide eyes, shadowy monstrous form looming in the background, cold blue tones
A warrior caught in giant green monstrous claws, struggling to break free, swamp setting
A stunned figure collapsed against a wall, limbs limp, gray-white drain effect, battlefield
A barely-visible outline of a rogue, translucent shimmer, footprints materializing on dusty floor, dungeon
A frozen warrior mid-step with yellow lightning arcs locking their muscles, rigid pose, dark stormy background
A warrior being turned to stone, half-flesh half-gray-stone, cracks spreading, ancient temple
A weakened figure with green venomous aura, sickly pallor, shaky stance, holding stomach, dark alley
A fallen warrior on the ground trying to stand, armor dented, muddy battlefield, enemy approaching
A figure bound in glowing magical chains, struggling against shackles, dim dungeon cell
A dazed warrior with stars swirling around head, dropped weapon, disoriented posture, arena
An unconscious warrior lying flat on their back, armor disheveled, gentle candlelight, tavern floor
An exhausted adventurer slumped against a rock, sweat on brow, torn cloak, barren wasteland under red sky

rules.prompt: Two glowing d20 dice side by side on a worn wooden tabletop, one lit blue the other red, magical runes floating
A warrior mid-sword-swing with a glowing golden action icon overlay, decisive pose, arena sand
A rogue performing a quick secondary strike with a dagger, motion blur lines, evening alley
A wizard casting a counterspell shield at an incoming fireball, split-second timing, magical sparks
A halberd striking at a fleeing enemy's back, weapon trail, cobblestone street, dynamic motion
A ranger hiding behind a stone wall mid-fight, peering around for a shot, sunlit castle courtyard
A hero braced against a fireball blast with arm raised, flames curving around them, magical ward shimmering
A knight's sword clashing with a goblin's shield, sparks flying, dramatic angle, torchlit dungeon
A massive greatsword cleaving through an orc in a burst of golden light, dynamic impact, battlefield
A compilation of elemental damage types swirling: fire, ice, lightning, acid, arcane glyphs, dark background
A wizard with eyes closed, glowing magical aura concentrating, floating spell runes around head, meditation chamber
Two fighters locked in a wrestling grapple on the ground, straining muscles, arena sand flying
A party of adventurers resting around a campfire in a forest clearing at night, food cooking, peaceful
A dying warrior on the ground rolling a glowing d20, golden death magic swirling, three pips overhead
An adventurer running across a battlefield with a speed blur trail, determined expression, chaos behind
A lantern held high in a pitch-black dungeon, warm light radius illuminating stone walls, shadowy corners
